pre.message: A bare empty catch block was added in packages/next/src/shared/lib/instant-nav-cookie.ts. Errors raised inside the try will be silently swallowed.

post.message: LLM judge was requested but is unavailable (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or the upstream call errored); deterministic-only verdict stands for this run.
Matcher strictness was weakened (AST-graded): tolerance widened, literal replaced with a wildcard, or range expanded. The test no longer constrains the original behavior as tightly.
